options.name: -check_type
options.description: Report in the specified check type

options.name: -clock_trees
options.description: Restricts the report to the specified clock trees.

options.name: -delay_corner
options.description: Report in the specified delay corner ((delay_corner), optional)

options.name: -expand_below_logic
options.description: Subtrees below multi-input logic will be fully listed below each logic input

options.name: -expand_generated_clock_trees
options.description: {independently inline independently_and_inline} Specifies how generated clock trees should be displayed

options.name: -file
options.description: Save a copy of the contents of the report to the specified file name

options.name: -include_reporting_only_skew_groups
options.description: Additionally include the reporting-only skew groups in the report.

options.name: -show_sinks
options.description: Include all clock network sinks in the report

options.name: -update_timing
options.description: Update and include detailed timing information such as pin slew, capacitance
